description: Treat Pinia store actions, getters, and state shape as shared component contracts.
body: Use when editing stores or components consuming stores. Do not rename state/actions without checking all consumers and tests. Keep async actions explicit about pending/error state and avoid direct component mutation of store internals unless established. Verify store tests and component smoke. Risk boundary includes persisted state and SSR store hydration. Use when Vue Frontend Engineering work touches visible UI behavior, browser console output, DOM state, assets, viewport behavior, and interaction evidence. Do not use this guidance to override a more specific pack, user instruction, or repository contract. Actions: choose the smallest direction that preserves the domain contract; inspect the current files first, keep the change scoped to the owning boundary, and record what evidence changed the decision. Validation signals include browser smoke, component tests, viewport screenshots, console/network checks, and accessibility assertions. Risk boundary: escalate or stop when the task involves visual regressions, inaccessible interaction, hydration mismatch, and browser-only failures, missing owner evidence, or live external state.
